## Paddable interface

Applies to areas that can have a padding.

**Signature:**

```typescript
interface Paddable 
```

## Properties

<table><thead><tr><th>

Property


</th><th>

</th><th>

</th></tr></thead>
<tbody><tr><td>

[padding?](./openrct2-flexui.paddable.padding.md)


</td><td>


</td><td>

[Padding](./openrct2-flexui.padding.md)


</td><td>

_(Optional)_ Specify the size of the padding around this widget. For allowed values, see [Scale](./openrct2-flexui.scale.md)<!-- -->.

\*\*Example usage:\*\* \* `padding: "5px"` - applies same padding (5 pixels) to all 4 sides. \* `padding: [ 5, "10%" ]` - applies 5 pixels to vertical sides, 10% to horizontal sides. \* `padding: [ 2, "3w", 4, "5%" ]` - applies in clockwise order; top, right, bottom, left. \* `padding: { top: 15 }` - applies only to named sides, the rest is default.

 "5px" for window frame, "6px" for box children, "0px" for everything else.


</td></tr>
</tbody></table>
